final:
module RefModule(
	input [3:0] A,
	input [3:0] B,
	input CLK,
	input RST,
	output reg [4:0] SUM
	);
	
	  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (RST) begin
			SUM <= 5'b0;
		end
		else begin
			SUM <= {1'b0, A} + {1'b0, B};
		end
	end

endmodule
